configSchema.title: OpenAI
configSchema.description: Connect OpenAI through Nango for Cinatra's model-backed workflows. Only workspace admins can change these settings.

variants.name: cleared
variants.message: The saved OpenAI API key was removed.

variants.name: error
variants.message: Something went wrong saving the OpenAI settings.

fields.label: Connection
fields.description: Check that the saved OpenAI API key resolves and has been validated.

fields.label: API key
fields.description: Paste your OpenAI API key to connect. It is validated before it is saved. Leave blank to keep the current saved key; use Disconnect to remove it.

fields.label: Project ID (optional)
fields.description: Scope API usage to a specific OpenAI project. Leave blank to keep the current saved value.

fields.label: Organization ID (optional)
fields.description: Scope to a specific OpenAI organization. Leave blank to keep the current saved value.

fields.label: Default model
fields.placeholder: Save a working key first, then choose the default model.
fields.description: Mini and nano models are excluded. Cinatra's web scraping and data extraction requires full-size models — smaller models skip direct page visits and fall back to keyword searches, producing incomplete results.

fields.label: OpenAI setup
fields.whenReady: OpenAI is connected. Use the Setup tab to update your API key, Project ID, Organization ID, service tier, or default model — mini and nano models are excluded from the picker because Cinatra's web scraping and data extraction requires full-size models.
fields.whenNotReady: Not connected yet. On the Setup tab, paste your OpenAI API key (Project ID and Organization ID are optional scoping), choose a service tier and default model, then click Connect — the key is validated against the OpenAI API before it is stored and is never shown again.
fields.description: Read-only setup guidance — nothing on this tab is saved. Only workspace admins can change these settings.
